title: Another month is passing ...
content:
This is (almost) customary already that I have to update something on the last day of each month -- eventhough I don't have any  **thought**  at all.

Oh, actually I have one news.  "Britain's Queen Mother has died":http://www.cnn.com/2002/WORLD/europe/03/30/queen.mum/index.html  in her sleep last night (early morning in UK). She is 101. (that's the AGE!)

Other than that, I don't have anything to say because right now I only have one word in my head. The word is  **HOT** .

So, enjoy the day/month and .. tomorrow is April's Fool! :)
